title: Machine Coding Round 2 — E-Commerce Mini App
description: 120-minute timed build combining Week 2 skills: product listing, search, filter, pagination, and shopping cart — without referring to previous code.
requirements: TIMED: 120 minutes maximum — treat as real interview
RULES: No AI assistants, no Google — React, MDN, React Router, and TypeScript official docs only
Do NOT copy-paste from previous day projects — rebuild from scratch
Product listing page with responsive grid
Search products by name (debounced or submit-based)
Category filter and price range filter
Add to cart, remove, quantity controls, cart total
Loading and error states on product fetch
acceptanceCriteria: Build completed within 120 minutes (log start/end time in README)
All core features functional: list, search, filter, pagination, cart
Cart state shared across pages without prop drilling
No console errors during normal user flow
Self-review section in README lists 3 weak areas and 3 strengths from Week 2
hints: First 10 minutes: scaffold routes, types, and folder structure — do not code UI yet.
Next 30 minutes: product fetch, list, filters, search.
Next 30 minutes: pagination and cart Context/reducer.
Final 50 minutes: wire pages, navbar badge, polish, fix build errors.
If stuck >10 minutes on one feature, skip and return — partial working app beats perfect one feature.
Official docs: react.dev, reactrouter.com, typescriptlang.org, developer.mozilla.org.

bonus.title: If time remains after core requirements
bonus.description: Optional points that impress interviewers — only after cart and pagination work.
requirements: Empty cart and empty search result states

debuggingScenarios.title: Running out of time
debuggingScenarios.symptom: 60 minutes in and only product list exists
debuggingScenarios.cause: Perfecting UI before core features; no time budget
debuggingScenarios.fix: Follow hint time boxes; ship cart with add-only first, then remove and quantity

debuggingScenarios.title: Cart not shared across routes
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Cart empty on cart page after adding on listing page
debuggingScenarios.cause: CartProvider inside one route or state in local useState
debuggingScenarios.fix: CartProvider wraps entire app above Router — Day 12 pattern

debuggingScenarios.title: Search and filter conflict
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Applying filter clears search or vice versa
debuggingScenarios.cause: Separate derived lists overwriting each other
debuggingScenarios.fix: Single useMemo pipeline: products → search → category → price → sort → paginate
